get.description: Retrieve a list of accounts for the current user

post.description: Create a new banking or manual account for the user

get.description: Retrieve specific account properties by ID

delete.description: Delete an account (and its associated dependencies according to business rules)

get.description: List recent audit events for an account visible to the current user
List active sharing links provided to other users for this account

put.description: Add or update view/admin permissions for another user on an account

delete.description: Remove access permissions given to another user for this account

post.description: Logout current user session on the server side
Get a new access token using an existing session
Authenticate a user and return tokens
Register a new user

get.description: Retrieve a list of budgets for the current user

get.description: Retrieve a specific budget by ID

delete.description: Delete a specific budget by ID

get.description: Retrieve all categories, optionally filtered by transaction type
Retrieve details of a specific category by ID
Retrieve a list of contacts for the current user

post.description: Create a new contact, optionally linked to another Goen user

get.description: Retrieve a specific contact by its ID

delete.description: Standardized soft-delete or link removal for a contact

post.description: Create a new debt record linked to a contact

delete.description: Delete a debt record by ID

Automatically create a payment transaction and link it to the debt

get.description: Returns the health status of the API
Retrieve current holdings for an investment account
Realized profit/loss report for an investment account
Retrieve trades associated with an investment account

post.description: Create a new trade for an investment account

delete.description: Delete a trade from an investment account

get.description: Retrieve the status of the global background market data sync routines

post.description: Trigger a global sync mapping all active investments to real-time prices
Trigger a refresh for distinct market symbols immediately
Manually queue an event updates fetch (dividends, splits) for a security
Manually queue a price refresh from provider for a specific security

get.description: Real-time sync status for a distinct security ID
Retrieve images via minio reverse proxy
Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user

patch.description: Update user information such as email, phone, displayName, or username

get.description: Retrieve a list of all previously uploaded avatars for the current user

post.description: Upload a new avatar image for the user
Change the password for the current user

get.description: Retrieve publicly visible debts for a specific participant linked to the username
Retrieve publicly visible group expense participants linked to the username
Retrieve public payment integration references like QR codes and banking details
Retrieve a user's publicly visible profile data using their unique username
Retrieve aggregated analytics, total wealth, and other dashboard indicators for the user

delete.description: Void a rotating savings contribution history by ID

get.description: Retrieve personal savings goals/accounts for the user

post.description: Create a personalized savings goal or instrument

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific savings instance

delete.description: Delete a savings goal by ID

get.description: Retrieve list of all available securities in the system
Retrieve details of a specific security by ID
Retrieve events (dividends, splits, etc) mapping to a security
Retrieve historical/daily prices for a security between dates

patch.description: Update the settings for the currently authenticated user

Retrieve a paginated list of transactions for the authenticated user
